status_semantics.completed: Contract outputs and required verification are present; this does not itself authorize a business write.
status_semantics.blocked: Required evidence, approval, capacity, or an observable prerequisite is unavailable; no claim of execution failure is made.
status_semantics.failed: An attempted or observed execution, contract, tool, or verification step failed and has failure evidence.
status_semantics.needs_human: Evidence or disagreement requires a named human decision.
status_semantics.frozen: Policy, revocation, integrity, or incident control prevents further action.
status_semantics.cancelled: The requester cancelled and all unexecuted Grants must be revoked.

invariants: Every material claim references at least one Evidence Receipt.
Blocked requires blocker reasons and cannot contain an observed failure assertion.
Failed requires a failure Evidence Receipt and cannot be inferred from missing evidence alone.
Budget used cannot exceed the authorized task budget.
L4 completed means candidate completed, not business action executed.
Irreversible or externally visible outcomes require a named approval reference and rollback or compensation reference.
Outcome acceptance does not issue Grants, expand data scope, or mutate enterprise memory.
A later correction creates a superseding outcome version and never overwrites this record.
